positive: A minimalist, abstract depiction of a whimsical forest gathering. Focus on strong, clean silhouette shapes of various stylized flora and fauna (e.g., gentle deer, glowing mushrooms, stylized fox tails, curved willow branches). The composition must be central and symmetrical, designed as a repeating seamless pattern suitable for apparel. Use a limited, nature-inspired color palette: deep forest green, muted gold, and creamy ivory. The art style should blend Art Nouveau organic curves with modern geometric simplification, achieved through linework and negative space. High contrast, clean vector art aesthetic, perfect for screen printing. Cinematic lighting, highly detailed, 8k, vibrant contrast.
